introText: Sometimes we notice our flaws easily but forget to acknowledge our strengths. This activity invites you to leave small notes of appreciation for yourself.
writeAppreciation: Write something you appreciate about yourself.
mirrorFilling: Your mirror is starting to fill with appreciation.
mirrorFull: Your mirror is filling with appreciation.
hint1: I keep trying even when things are hard.
reflectionText: Take a moment to read these notes. They reflect parts of you that deserve appreciation.
howDidItFeel: How did it feel to acknowledge these parts of yourself?
evenOnDifficultDays: Even on difficult days, these qualities remain a part of you.
whatOneThing: What is one thing you appreciate about yourself?
listenEmpathy: I listen to people with empathy.
